description_long: This sconce features a vertically elongated, teardrop-shaped glass shade with a ribbed or pleated texture, suspended from a thin cord or wire. The glass body is opaque or frosted, diffusing light softly and evenly. The top of the sconce has a rounded, ornamental cap that transitions smoothly into the hanging cord. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with a focus on clean lines and subtle surface detailing. The fixture is likely intended for ceiling mounting, providing downward illumination. Its minimalist aesthetic makes it suitable for modern or contemporary urban environments.
description: A vertically elongated, ribbed glass sconce with a rounded cap, suspended from a thin cord. The design is minimalist and elegant, ideal for modern urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full teardrop shape, ribbed glass texture, and the central hanging cord.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetrical ribbing and the smooth transition from cap to cord.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the ribbed glass and rounded cap clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the symmetrical ribbed glass and the hanging cord.
attribute_fixture_design: Minimalist and modern, with a focus on clean lines and a ribbed glass texture that adds subtle visual interest.
